name: Inhibit System Recovery
description: Detects deletion of shadow copies and backup catalogs to prevent recovery
query:
// Detect shadow copy deletion and recovery inhibition
// Trigger on vssadmin, wbadmin, or bcdedit recovery commands
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(vssadmin.*delete.*shadows|wbadmin.*delete.*catalog|bcdedit.*/set.*recoveryenabled.*no|wmic.*shadowcopy.*delete|Get-WmiObject.*Win32_ShadowCopy.*Delete)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
